page_content:
### **4. Dr. Vijay Vaidyanathan (The Department Head)**  
_Focus: Respecting his vision while justifying your current path._  
**Subject:** Medical School Application & Update: Arian Moridani  
Dear Dr. Vaidyanathan,  
I hope you are doing well. I often think back to the three courses I took with you and the high standards of engineering excellence you set for the department.  
I wanted to update you on my progress. While I deeply valued your encouragement to pursue a PhD at UNT, I felt a strong calling toward the clinical application of engineering. To that end, I am currently completing my **Master’s in Computer Science (Machine Learning) at Georgia Tech** while preparing to apply to medical school. My goal is to become a physician who can lead the implementation of AI and big data in healthcare—a path that merges the industrial insights I gained in your courses with direct patient care.  
Your endorsement as Department Head would be a significant honor for my application. **To minimize the administrative burden, I have set up an Interfolio account** so that you would only need to upload your letter once for all portals.  
Would you be willing to support my medical school candidacy?  
Respectfully, Arian Moridani  
---
